phoneticUs: 藞k忙r蕦艐kl; k蓹藞r蕦艐kl
examples: Caruncle a fleshy outgrowth from a seed, similar to, but smaller than, an aril.
Conclusion: Hyperthophic lacrimal caruncle may be the cause of functional epiphora in some patients.
When they signed for the vast universe and wonderful scene, a caruncle suddenly grew out on the non-ego's left wrist.
